pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler release target and enforcement rules from Java 11 to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code compiled for Java 11 may use APIs or language features unavailable in Java 17, or conversely, the project intends to use Java 17 features which require the compiler to target 17. Without this, the build targets the wrong JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta XML Binding (JAXB) dependencies to replace the removed javax.xml.bind module from JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Without explicit dependencies, any code using JAXB will fail to compile or throw NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta RESTful Web Services (JAX-RS) dependencies to replace the removed javax.ws.rs module.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAX-RS APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Without explicit dependencies, any code using JAX-RS annotations or classes will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Persistence API dependencies to replace the removed javax.persistence module.
pom.xml.why_exists: JPA APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Without explicit dependencies, any code using JPA annotations or interfaces will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Bean Validation dependencies to replace the removed javax.validation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: Bean Validation APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Without explicit dependencies, any code using validation annotations will fail to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Expression Language dependencies required by Jakarta EE specs like JAX-RS and JPA.
pom.xml.why_exists: Expression Language APIs were removed from the JDK in Java 11. Jakarta EE implementations often require EL at runtime; missing it causes runtime failures in frameworks like JAX-RS.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Javadoc plugin to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the Javadoc plugin may fail to compile documentation on Java 17 due to internal API changes or stricter checks in the JDK 17 javadoc tool.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer plugin to require Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build would not enforce the Java 17 requirement, potentially allowing builds on older JDKs which are incompatible with the new code.

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch the Maven Docker image from an OpenJ9 JDK 11 variant to an AdoptOpenJDK 16 variant to align with the target JDK version.
mvn.sh.why_exists: The project targets JDK 17; running builds on JDK 11 will fail due to incompatible language features or APIs introduced in newer JDK versions.

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch from running the container as the host user ID to using the image's internal user via runuser, requiring PUID/PGID environment variables.
mvn.sh.why_exists: The new Docker image (brunoe/maven) likely does not support arbitrary user IDs via -u flag in the same way, or requires specific environment variables (PUID/PGID) to function correctly with its internal user management, causing permission errors or startup failures without this change.
mvn.sh.after: --env PUID=`id -u` -e PGID=`id -g` ... runuser --user user --group user -- mvn
